case_metadata.case_name: Clifford Luttrell, DDS and Boerne Dental Center, PLLC v. Amy Mulroy
case_metadata.court: Thirteenth District of Texas, Court of Appeals

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Appellee Amy Mulroy filed a medical malpractice lawsuit against appellants and the jury awarded damages totaling $131,358.66.
evidence_index.summary: Jury awarded damages of $131,358.66 to Amy Mulroy.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: On September 20, 2021, appellee filed suit against appellants for medical malpractice arising from the negligent and improper treatment of appellee when she sought treatment for restoration of her teeth due to a malocclusion.
evidence_index.summary: Amy Mulroy filed suit for negligent treatment related to dental restoration.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Dr. Luttrell testified that it is 'the dentist’s job, and sole job, to make sure that the dental bur [—] is properly seated and secured' into a dental handpiece.
evidence_index.summary: Dr. Luttrell stated it is the dentist's responsibility to secure the dental bur.
evidence_index.speaker: Dr. Luttrell

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Dr. Luttrell testified that he has 'no specific memory' of his 'process of placement of the bur into the handpiece' related to providing dental treatment to appellee.
evidence_index.summary: Dr. Luttrell does not recall the specific process of bur placement for the treatment.
evidence_index.speaker: Dr. Luttrell

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Dr. Luttrell further testified that the bur landed in 'the back of [appellee’s] tongue . . . lodged between the tongue and the throat . . . [the] worst possible place.'
evidence_index.summary: The bur landed in a critical area between the tongue and throat.
evidence_index.speaker: Dr. Luttrell

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: In the days after the bur was swallowed by appellee, x-rays were performed to locate the bur. The first two x-rays showed the bur in the small intestines. A subsequent CT scan showed the bur in the mesentery, an organ that surrounds other gut organs and holds them in place. The bur ultimately became lodged in appellee’s appendix, resulting in appellee’s appendectomy.
evidence_index.summary: X-rays and CT scan showed the bur moved to the appendix, requiring appendectomy.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Dr. Boyle testified that an improperly sized dental bur shank would have been noticeable to the practitioner upon inserting it in a handpiece because you can 'feel it, like you move it, you see it slip.'
evidence_index.summary: Dr. Boyle stated an improperly sized bur would be noticeable upon insertion.
evidence_index.speaker: Dr. Boyle

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: We affirm the judgment of the trial court.
evidence_index.summary: The trial court's judgment is affirmed.
evidence_index.speaker: Judge's conclusion

verdict_detected.key_phrase: We affirm the judgment of the trial court.

gaps_identified: Limited details on expert testimony specifics

initial_state.history_of_present_illness: Patient sought treatment for restoration of her teeth due to a malocclusion.

requestables.name: X-ray
requestables.description: X-ray to locate the dental bur

reveal.decision_impact: Requires further imaging to track bur movement

requestables.name: CT scan
requestables.description: CT scan to locate the dental bur

reveal.result_summary: Bur in the mesentery, later lodged in appendix

decision_points.prompt: How should the dental bur be secured in the handpiece?

options.description: Ensure the dental bur is properly seated and secured
Proceed without checking the bur's seating
options.clinical_reasoning: Neglecting this step can lead to dislodgement

actual_action_defendant.description: Defendant did not ensure proper seating of the bur
actual_action_defendant.reasoning_stated: Defendant had no specific memory of the process

expected_action_court.description: Proper seating of the bur should have been ensured
expected_action_court.standard_of_care_basis: Expert testimony indicated it is noticeable if improperly seated

explanation.why_defendant_wrong: Failure to ensure proper seating led to bur dislodgement
explanation.what_should_have_happened: Proper seating would have prevented the incident

decision_points.prompt: What imaging should be performed to locate the swallowed bur?

options.description: Order X-ray and CT scan to track bur movement
options.clinical_reasoning: Necessary to determine bur location and plan intervention
Imaging is critical to assess risk and plan treatment

actual_action_defendant.description: X-ray and CT scan were ordered
actual_action_defendant.reasoning_stated: To locate the bur and assess the need for intervention

expected_action_court.description: Imaging was necessary to track the bur
expected_action_court.standard_of_care_basis: Imaging is standard to locate foreign objects

explanation.why_defendant correct: Imaging was appropriately ordered to track the bur
explanation.what_should_have_happened: Imaging confirmed the bur's location and need for surgery
explanation.legal_standard_applied: Standard of care for foreign object ingestion

timeline_phases.name: Initial Dental Consultation
timeline_phases.description: Patient presents for dental restoration due to malocclusion

timeline_phases.name: Dental Procedure
timeline_phases.description: Dental restoration procedure where bur was improperly secured

timeline_phases.name: Post-Procedure Follow-up
timeline_phases.description: Imaging performed to locate swallowed bur

patient_outcome.description: Bur lodged in appendix, requiring appendectomy

key_findings: Breach of duty in failing to secure the dental bur
Causation established - improper bur placement led to appendectomy

malpractice_determination.counterfactual: Properly securing the bur would have prevented dislodgement
